leadText: The Dragon Scale (Japanese: りゅうのウロコ Dragon Scale) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It allows Seadra to evolve into Kingdra.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.1.1 In battle 1.2 Outside battles Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Gold, Silver , and Crystal , it increases the power of Dragon-type moves by 10% when held due to an oversight (while the Dragon Fang —the item which was intended to have this effect—has no effect). In Pokémon Stadium 2 , both Dragon Fang and Dragon Scale boost the power of Dragon-type moves. From Generation III onward, Dragon Scale has no effect in battle. Outside battles [ edit | edit source ] Causes Seadra to evolve into Kingdra when traded while holding it, which consumes the Dragon Scale. Seadra will not evolve if linking to a Generation I game.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Dragon Scale at Luminous Cave or Luminous Spring , Seadra can be evolved into Kingdra . This consumes the Link Cable and Dragon Scale. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Gold, Silver , and Crystal , it increases the power of Dragon-type moves by 10% when held due to an oversight (while the Dragon Fang —the item which was intended to have this effect—has no effect). In Pokémon Stadium 2 , both Dragon Fang and Dragon Scale boost the power of Dragon-type moves. From Generation III onward, Dragon Scale has no effect in battle.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Starting at level 10, Dragon Scales can be rarely obtained from Spinning PokéStops or Gyms Opening a Gift While normally rare, from March 21, 2017 onward, the player is guaranteed to find an Evolution item when obtaining the bonus for spinning a Photo Disc for the seventh day in a row. Additionally, the player receives a Dragon Scale when completing part 6 of the Special Research "A Ripple in Time".
